arts.ttl: Five insights from Wrexham's record financial results
arts.sum: BBC Sport Wales looks at the main talking points as League One promotion hopefuls Wrexham report record financial results.

arts.ttl: Wrexham revenue up 155% amid promotion push
arts.sum: Wrexham reported record financial results for their first year back in the EFL in the latest chapter of the club's success story.

arts.ttl: Wrexham announce record turnover as Hollywood influence grows
arts.sum: Wrexham’s increasing popularity in the United States helped the club secure record revenue of £26.7m in their latest accounts, up 155 per cent on the previous year.

arts.ttl: Real 'reason' Wrexham took 37-minute flight for League One match as Ryan Reynolds under fire
arts.sum: Wrexham's Hollywood owners have been criticised after it was found that the club chartered a private jet for a brief 37-minute flight ahead of their game against Wycombe Wanderers

arts.ttl: The huge amount of money Ryan Reynolds and Wrexham will get if they are promoted to the Championship
arts.sum: Wrexham stand on the brink of possible promotion to the Championship under Hollywood owners Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney

arts.ttl: Paul Mullin sent message on Wrexham future after Ryan Reynolds' favourite player frozen out
arts.sum: Paul Mullin has barely featured for Wrexham since January following the signings of Sam Smith and Jay Rodriguez, leading to speculation about his future at the club

arts.ttl: 'I was on Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney call - this was their reaction to Wrexham wages news'
arts.sum: Hollywood A-listers Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney have pumped millions of pounds into Wrexham since taking over in 2021 - but could face even more costs

arts.ttl: Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney's reaction to being told Wrexham wages might quadruple
arts.sum: Wrexham owners Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney have pumped large sums of money into the club over the last few years but have been told that may need to increase further

Cambridge were unable to get the victory they so badly needed against Northampton and are now winless in six games and in desperate trouble. The U's are 11 points from safety with just eight games le...

arts.ttl: Wrexham guilty of hypocrisy as Ryan Reynolds' pledge undermined by 37-minute flight
arts.sum: Wrexham took a short-haul flight on a private jet to a game against Wycombe four days before Ryan Reynolds visited the United Nations to trumpet the club signing up to an environmental pledge
